title: Scatha Rarity Outlines
description: A resource pack for Hypixel Skyblock that adds an outline around Scatha pet items to indicate their rarity
body:
**Requires OptiFine!** This resource pack for Hypixel Skyblock makes it easier to tell which rarity a Scatha pet item has: ![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/T9mrdJd3/images/ed2c9c710a88bc69a92f35f91d17f6f10e43dbe4.png) **Note**: I unfortunately cannot change this for the GUI slots only, so it also overrides the model/texture when held in the hand - luckily, due to how OptiFine CIT works on skulls, it *doesn't* override it when worn on the head, so the actual pet is unchanged!
_Why?_ Because I already made the Scatha rarity textures before to use as Discord emojis and someone suggested to make a pack out of them. _Why not for all pets?_ Because that would require setting it up for every single pet's available rarities individually along with making the textures, which I can't be bothered to do. (Scappas = best pet anyway <3)
